🩹 1.1.1: Background Animation Optimization

Oct 23, 2024

🐞 Bug Fixes

:::details ::summary[bg: Mitigate CPU spike caused by ‘dot’ background animation (fix #1) (8fb85e1)]

  • Lowered frame rate to reduce renders per second
  • Optimized drawing method to decrease computation
  • Reduced CPU usage by approximately 55% (from 70% to 31%) :::

🏡 Chore

  • Update docs (64cb7c6)
  • Update dev/prod deps (e7665b5)
  • Update docs & adjust style import (c20bace)
